paper.title: Unified stress-strain model of concrete for FRP-confined columns

evidence.evidence_text: Uniﬁed stress–strain model of concrete for FRP-conﬁned columns You-Yi Wei, Yu-Fei Wu ⇑ Department of Building and Construction, City University of Hong Kong, Tat Chee Ave., Hong Kong article info Article history: Received 13 August 2010 Received in revised form 4 June 2011 Accepted 18 June 2011 Available online 14 July 2011 Keywords: Compressive strength Concrete FRP Modeling Stress–strain model abstract This paper presents a uniﬁed stress–strain model of concrete for circular, square, and rectangular col- umns conﬁned by ﬁber-reinforced polymer (FRP) jackets. Through the uniﬁcation, the variation of param- eters is continuous and consistent, which overcomes the inconsistency or discontinuit
